The question is asking to determine the first year in which Ernie Els won a championship. Since there is a "championship" column containing dates, we need to sort the data using the f_sort_column(championship) operation with the order "small to large" to find the earliest year Ernie Els won.
Ernie Els won championships in the years 2004 and 2010. The first year he won was 2004. Therefore, the answer is 2004.
